title: Portable Context Control Plane — Shared Enum Definitions
description: Shared $defs-only library containing all 10 closed MVP enum definitions used across CLI input, internal object, and output schemas. This file is not a standalone document schema — do not validate documents directly against its root. Downstream schemas must $ref individual $defs entries. Every enum value is canonical; do not add new values without an explicit cross-spec decision pass. Non-MVP values are explicitly excluded. Canonical sources: docs/05 §3-5, docs/06 §4 §11.3.1a §20 §27, docs/12 §6.1.
$comment: Pass 4.9C-2A (Batch A creation) + Pass 4.9C-2A.1 (duplicate key cleanup). No code. No runtime. No provider/model calls. Intentionally type:null at root — definition library only; documents must not be validated directly against this root.

SelectionAction.title: SelectionDecision action enum
SelectionAction.description: The 4 valid SelectionDecision.action values in MVP. Canonical owner: docs/06 §4. 'quarantine' is registry-phase state only and is NOT a valid action (F-17 resolved). 'unavailable' is future-only (5-Q7/F-28 safe-defer).

SelectionPath.title: SelectionDecision path enum
SelectionPath.description: The 12 valid path values for SelectionDecision in MVP. Canonical owner: docs/06 §4 path table and docs/12 §6.1. Each path is valid only with the action(s) noted in the spec.

SelectionConfidence.title: SelectionDecision confidence enum
SelectionConfidence.description: The 3 valid confidence values for SelectionDecision in MVP. Canonical owner: docs/06 §4. String enum only — no float confidence on SelectionDecision (F-08 resolved). Numeric confidence scores for other uses (e.g. requestSignals.familyConfidence) use distinct field names.

ComponentType.title: Component type enum
ComponentType.description: The 8 valid component type values in MVP. Canonical owner: docs/05 §4. Each type maps to a primary selector (docs/06 §14).

RiskLevel.title: Component riskLevel enum
RiskLevel.description: The 4 valid riskLevel values in MVP. Canonical owner: docs/05 §5. 'critical' components must have at least one hard protection (retainPolicy: safety_critical OR omissionPolicy: never); absence of both is a hard validation error.

OmissionPolicy.title: Component omissionPolicy enum
OmissionPolicy.description: The 3 valid omissionPolicy values in MVP. Canonical owner: docs/05 §5. 'fail_open' components are never trimmed by the Budgeter in MVP (F-30 safe-defer: future budgetTrimmable override not implemented).

RetainPolicy.title: Component retainPolicy enum
RetainPolicy.description: The 4 valid retainPolicy values in MVP. Canonical owner: docs/05 §5. 'safety_critical' components trigger budgetOverflow rather than being trimmed. 'mandatory' components are included in every plan regardless of family or budget.

DefaultAction.title: Component defaultAction enum
DefaultAction.description: The 3 valid defaultAction values for component registry entries in MVP. Canonical owner: docs/05 §5. 'omit' is invalid for components with retainPolicy: mandatory/safety_critical or omissionPolicy: never — the registry loader overrides to 'include' with a non-fatal warning.

BudgetHint.title: Budget hint enum
BudgetHint.description: The 5 canonical budgetHint values in MVP. Canonical owner: docs/06 §20 and §27. These values may appear as optional informational annotations on SelectionDecision (docs/06 §20.4) and as conditionally required survival fields on ResolvedSelectionDecision (docs/06 §27). The Budgeter uses these to inform trim decisions. No other values are permitted.

ResolutionRule.title: Conflict resolution rule enum
ResolutionRule.description: The 14 canonical resolutionRule values in MVP. Canonical owner: docs/06 §11.3.1a. Strict enum — any value not in this list is a harness failure. Future additions require an explicit cross-spec decision pass.
